artifacts.summary: Implemented Phase 2 (ProofStepRecord schema, step_to_action_index) and Phase 4 (load_proof_steps ingestion pipeline, statistics, CLI). 87 tests passing. Phases 1, 3, 5 (Lean-side) deferred pending Lean build environment.

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented Python-side proof step schema (ProofStepRecord dataclass, step_to_action_index function) and ingestion pipeline (load_proof_steps, get_frame_class_mask, proof_step_statistics, extract_and_ingest CLI). 87 tests passing. Lean-side phases (1, 3, 5) deferred.

partial_progress.deferred_reason: Phases 1, 3, 5 require Lean 4 build environment (BimodalLogic lake build) which is not available in this Python implementation context.
